# third_party

This directory hosts vendored engine sources and local patches.

## Recommended source
- DoomGeneric: https://github.com/ozkl/doomgeneric

## Layout
- `doomgeneric/` (git clone manually)
- `patches/doomgeneric_fax.patch` (platform adaptation patch placeholder)

## Note
Keep this repo compliant with upstream licenses. IWAD files are not redistributed here.
